result:
`make` exits 0, no errors, all three binaries built successfully.

Summary of changes:
- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` declaration now takes `int clock_source`.
- `src/utils/os_unix.c`: definition updated to accept `clock_source` (unused, behavior unchanged — always treated as 0).
- Updated all 27 real call sites across `wpa_supplicant/` and `src/` to pass `0` as the second argument.
- Left `src/utils/os_win32.c`, `os_none.c`, `os_internal.c` untouched — they're alternate platform implementations not compiled by this build (only `os_unix.c` is, per `compile_commands.json`), and the task scoped the definition change to `os_unix.c` only.
